Paste Audit and Training Names

Paste one name per line. The import will match employees and split them into Day, Night, or Other.

Add Employee
Type the actual UP ID manually, or use the dropdown for a follow-up status.
No actual password is stored in this tracker.
Checked employees show a gold MT flag next to their name.
Bulk Import Employees

Paste rows as: First Last, Conglobal ID, UP ID, Password Status, Email, Shift, Phone, Days Off. Existing employees are matched by Conglobal ID, UP ID, email, phone, or exact name. Password Status accepts Missing, On File, Reset Needed, Verified, or Not Required.

Last 10 saves. Click Restore to roll back.
